embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s

details.note: message was not in cache — only fields in raw_data available

before.content:
# Zone awareness (Most important skill) 
Alot of players watch enemies 
Good players watch: 
- Storm timer 
- Next zone pull 
- Terrain 
- Cover routes 
- Hight positions 
- Third-party angles  
Read the **dead sides** of zone 
Dead side = quiter side with fewer players 
Most players rotate from:
- Big POIs 
- Hight 
- Popular sides in map 
So if zone pulls north , and south side had most fights:
- Rotate through east/west edges instead 
- Avoide center chaos  
This gives: 
- Cleaner rotates 
- Less beams 
- Easier positioning 
- Free tags on late rotators 
# End game fight rule 
If a fight lasts 10 seconds **leave** or **finish** instantly 
Becuase:
- Third parties arrive instantly 
- Storm moves 
- Overshield disspears 
- your positipn gets exposed 
# soft positioning 
This is what unrealplayers abuse 
Instead of:
- Hard claiming one spot 
They:
- Constantly repostion nearby 
- Change angles 
- Rotat micro-over 
- Stay unpredictable 
You become **way** harder to focus 
# endgame terrain abuse 
The best players use:
- Tiny hills 
- Ridges 
- Rocks 
- Cars s
- Dips in terrain
- Head glitches 
Even a tiny slope can save your life 
Espicially now with stronger movement mechanics 
# Final moving zone 
Top 3 situations 
Most players  panic here 
Winning player:
- Stay calm
- Wait for mistakes 
- Force other to rotate first
Usually the winner is:
**The player who shoots last** 
# Best endgame mentality
Don't think: 
>how do i kill everyone 
Think:
>How do i become the hardest player to kill?
The mentality instantly improves Zero Build engames
